name: HSBC RuPay Platinum Credit Card
exclusions: transactions excluded under HSBC RuPay Platinum Credit Card terms
additionalBenefits: No joining fee and no annual fee
Rs 500 cashback after logging into HSBC India app and spending Rs 5,000 within first 30 days
Rs 250 Amazon eGift Voucher for online application and video KYC
2-month EazyDiner membership on RuPay card activation
UPI payments through HSBC SimplyPay and other UPI apps
Reward points on credit card linked UPI payments
Fuel surcharge waiver benefit with annual savings up to Rs 3,000

salaried: Age 18 to 65 years, Indian resident and eligible city residence
selfEmployed: Age 25 to 65 years, Indian resident and eligible city residence
